name: Rigid Body From Library
description: Load a pre-defined RigidBody from RigidBodyLibrary (e.g. 'target_marker'). Also outputs its visual meshes as Rhino geometry for preview.

inputParameters.name: name
inputParameters.description: Name of the RigidBodyLibrary classmethod to call (e.g. 'target_marker').

inputParameters.name: rigid_body_id
inputParameters.description: Optional id for the body. Used as its key when wired into a Load Robot Cell component's `rigid_bodies` input. Defaults to the library entry name.

inputParameters.name: size
inputParameters.description: Scaling parameter passed to the library factory. Defaults to 1.0.

outputParameters.name: meshes
outputParameters.description: The body's visual meshes as Rhino geometry, drawn in the body's own base frame. For preview only.
